name: Maurya Empire
note: Ashoka converted to Buddhism and propagated it across Asia — a major religious shift mid-dynasty that changed the empire's entire ideological character

figures.name: Chandragupta Maurya
figures.significance: Unified India for the first time; expelled Macedonian garrisons

figures.name: Kautilya (Chanakya)
figures.significance: Author of the Arthashastra — the first systematic treatise on statecraft

figures.name: Ashoka the Great
figures.significance: Converted to Buddhism after Kalinga War; spread Buddhism to Central Asia, Sri Lanka, Southeast Asia
